rationale:
Selected parameters: vol_hi=0.05, vol_lo=0.008 (score 1.5000, 3 accepted of 12 candidates).
- only 1 of 3 accepted trials are within 5% of the best — narrow optimum, sensitive to parameter drift.
- 9 of 12 candidates rejected by the objective constraints — the feasible region is tight.
Supporting evidence from the knowledge base: [starter-vol-regimes: Empirical Properties of the VIX Term Structure]; [starter-vol-regimes: Empirical Properties of the VIX Term Structure].
